segments.text: A Bengaluru startup just beat Chat GPT and Google Gemini. Server AI released two [music] models Serum Vision and Bulbull V3. Servision achieved 84.3%
accuracy on OM OCR bench beating Gemini 3 Pro Chat GPT and Deep Seek OCR V2. On Omnidok Bench, it hit 93.28%.
layouts, technical tables, mathematical formulas, and mixed language content that global models struggle with. Bulbal V3 is a textto-spech [music] model
supporting 35 voices across all 22 official Indian languages. DDas a former Google employee and tech commentator
publicly admitted that he was wrong about server. Serb's larger goal is sovereign AI models built in India trained on local data run on local
infrastructure without full dependence on foreign systems. [music] But the gap between best for India specific tasks and globally competitive across all AI
capabilities is real. Selvin wins where global models don't prioritize [music]
indic languages, scanned government documents, regional accents, and English content. Do you think that sovereign AI models would challenge global giants?
Let me know in the comments.
